name: Catch the Candy
author: Poki
description: Catch the Candy is the remastered version of a Flash classic created by Yohoho Games. A classic puzzle game at heart, Catch the Candy allows you to use your stretchy and sticky lims to propel yourself up to catch all the candy! There are 77 levels with colorful visuals and realistic rope-based mechanics. Go ahead and try this diabetes-inducingly sweet game! How to play: Use rope - Hold down left mouse button About the creator: Catch the Candy was created by Yohoho Games. This is their first game on Poki !
